results.query: migrate all vllm instances to a new GPU server

arguments.reason:
This is a multi-step infrastructure migration involving moving 4 vllm instances (vllm-35b, vllm-8b, vllm-4b, vllm-vlm) to a new GPU server. This requires:
- Provisioning or configuring the new GPU server
- Migrating model data and configurations
- Updating service configurations and port assignments
- Coordinating downtime or implementing blue-green deployment
- Updating any dependent services (llm-proxy, monitoring)

This has broad impact across the infrastructure and cannot be trivially rolled back. Human oversight is required to plan and execute this migration safely.

results.query: set up a new OpenClaw instance for a third user

arguments.reason:
Setting up a new OpenClaw instance for a third user involves provisioning a new service, configuring ports, and making infrastructure changes. This requires human oversight to:
1. Determine appropriate port allocation (existing instances use port 18789)
2. Configure user authentication and access controls
3. Ensure proper service registration and monitoring
4. Coordinate with any proxy/load balancer configuration

Please provide details on the new user (name, desired configuration) so I can assist with the setup once the requirements are clarified.
